[Elab.command] [0.037125] вң…пёҸ /--
    If `M` and `MвӮӮ` are both `R`-semimodules and `S`-semimodules and `R`-semimodule structures
    are defined by an action of `R` on `S` (formally, we have two scalar towers), then any `S`-linear
    equivalence from `M` to `MвӮӮ` is also an `R`-linear equivalence.
    
    See also `LinearMap.restrictScalars`. -/
    @[simps!, simps toLinearMap]
    def restrictScalars (f : M вүғвӮ—[S] MвӮӮ) : M вүғвӮ—[R] MвӮӮ
        where
      toLinearMap := f.toLinearMap.restrictScalars R
      invFun := f.symm
      left_inv := f.left_inv
      right_inv := f.right_inv

[Elab.command] [0.057664] вң…пёҸ /-- The equivalence between R-linear maps from `R` to `M`, and points of `M` itself.
    This says that the forgetful functor from `R`-modules to types is representable, by `R`.
    
    This is an `S`-linear equivalence, under the assumption that `S` acts on `M` commuting with `R`.
    When `R` is commutative, we can take this to be the usual action with `S = R`.
    Otherwise, `S = в„•` shows that the equivalence is additive.
    See note [bundled maps over different rings].
    -/
    @[simps]
    def ringLmapEquivSelf [Module S M] [SMulCommClass R S M] : (R вҶ’вӮ—[R] M) вүғвӮ—[S] M :=
      { applyвӮ—' S (1 : R) with
        toFun := fun f вҶҰ f 1
        invFun := smulRight (1 : R вҶ’вӮ—[R] R)
        left_inv := fun f вҶҰ by
          ext
          simp only [coe_smulRight, Module.End.one_apply, smul_eq_mul, вҶҗ map_smul f, mul_one]
        right_inv := fun x вҶҰ by simp }

[Elab.command] [0.193158] вң…пёҸ set_option backward.isDefEq.respectTransparency false in
    /-- A linear isomorphism between the domains and codomains of two spaces of linear maps gives a
    linear isomorphism between the two function spaces.
    
    See `LinearEquiv.arrowCongrAddEquiv` for the additive version of this isomorphism that works
    over a not necessarily commutative semiring. -/
    def arrowCongr (eвӮҒ : MвӮҒ вүғвӮӣвӮ—[ПғвӮҒвӮӮ] MвӮӮ) (eвӮӮ : MвӮҒ' вүғвӮӣвӮ—[ПғвӮҒ'вӮӮ'] MвӮӮ') : (MвӮҒ вҶ’вӮӣвӮ—[ПғвӮҒвӮҒ'] MвӮҒ') вүғвӮӣвӮ—[ПғвӮҒ'вӮӮ'] (MвӮӮ вҶ’вӮӣвӮ—[ПғвӮӮвӮӮ'] MвӮӮ')
        where
      __ := arrowCongrAddEquiv eвӮҒ eвӮӮ
      map_smul' c f := by ext; simp [arrowCongrAddEquiv, map_smulвӮӣвӮ—]

    If `M` and `MвӮӮ` are linearly isomorphic then the two spaces of linear maps from `M` and `MвӮӮ` to
    themselves are linearly isomorphic.
    
    See `LinearEquiv.conjRingEquiv` for the isomorphism between endomorphism rings,
    which works over a not necessarily commutative semiring. -/

[Elab.command] [0.015888] вң…пёҸ /--
    If `MвӮӮ` and `MвӮғ` are linearly isomorphic then the two spaces of linear maps from `M` into `MвӮӮ`
    and `M` into `MвӮғ` are linearly isomorphic. -/
    def congrRight (f : MвӮӮ вүғвӮ—[R] MвӮғ) : (M вҶ’вӮ—[R] MвӮӮ) вүғвӮ—[R] M вҶ’вӮ—[R] MвӮғ :=
      arrowCongr (LinearEquiv.refl R M) f

[Elab.command] [0.049927] вң…пёҸ /-- An `R`-linear isomorphism between two `R`-modules `MвӮӮ` and `MвӮғ` induces an `S`-linear
    isomorphism between `MвӮӮ вҶ’вӮ—[R] M` and `MвӮғ вҶ’вӮ—[R] M`, if `M` is both an `R`-module and an
    `S`-module and their actions commute. -/
    @[simps]
    def congrLeft {R} (S) [Semiring R] [Semiring S] [Module R MвӮӮ] [Module R MвӮғ] [Module R M] [Module S M]
        [SMulCommClass R S M] (e : MвӮӮ вүғвӮ—[R] MвӮғ) : (MвӮӮ вҶ’вӮ—[R] M) вүғвӮ—[S] (MвӮғ вҶ’вӮ—[R] M)
        where
      __ := e.arrowCongrAddEquiv (.refl ..)
      map_smul' _ _ := rfl

    construct a linear equivalence `(n вҶ’ M) вүғвӮ—[R] (m вҶ’ M)` -/
    def funCongrLeft (e : m вүғ n) : (n вҶ’ M) вүғвӮ—[R] m вҶ’ M :=
      LinearEquiv.ofLinear (funLeft R M e) (funLeft R M e.symm)
        (LinearMap.ext fun x вҶҰ
          funext fun i вҶҰ by rw [id_apply, вҶҗ funLeft_comp, Equiv.symm_comp_self, LinearMap.funLeft_id])

          funext fun i вҶҰ by rw [id_apply, вҶҗ funLeft_comp, Equiv.self_comp_symm, LinearMap.funLeft_id])

    (the product over `S`) and (the product over `T`).
    
    This is `Equiv.sumPiEquivProdPi` as a `LinearEquiv`.
    -/
    @[simps -fullyApplied +simpRhs]
    def sumPiEquivProdPi (R : Type*) [Semiring R] (S T : Type*) (A : S вҠ• T вҶ’ Type*) [вҲҖ st, AddCommMonoid (A st)]

      __ := Equiv.sumPiEquivProdPi _
      map_add' _ _ := rfl
      map_smul' _ _ := rfl

    /-- Left multiplication by a unit of a semiring as a linear equivalence. -/
    def mulLeftLinearEquiv : AЛЈ вҶ’* A вүғвӮ—[R] A
